Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course includes discussions on 'Gatronomi Turizmi' (Gastronomy Tourism) and 'İnanç Turizmi' (Faith Tourism), which can indirectly relate to promoting sustainable tourism and local culture, aligning with Target 8.9.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course discusses various forms of tourism, which, while not explicitly focused on sustainable consumption, touches upon an industry that has sustainable consumption aspects (Target 12.b). The link is minimal.
